wine_tours.name: Vinotrip A Day in the Beaujolais Vineyard
wine_tours.address: Belleville-en-Beaujolais region (departure point varies by package), France
wine_tours.description: Full-day wine tourism tour by Vinotrip visiting 2 to 3 domaines, with guided tastings, vineyard walks, and lunch at a local producer. Packages range from day tours (EUR 105) to multi-day stays including Chateau de Pizay and the Fleurie and Morgon Crus.
wine_tours.tour_type: Guided small group and private; minibus from Lyon
wine_tours.price_range: From EUR 105 per person for 1-day tour

wine_tours.name: Kanpai Tourisme Beaujolais Crus and Chateaux
wine_tours.description: Small-group guided half-day minibus tours from Lyon through the Beaujolais Crus and Pierres Dorees. Covers Fleurie, Morgon, and Moulin-a-Vent with 2 domaine tastings. Full-day Beaujolais Crus tours also available from EUR 110.
wine_tours.tour_type: Small-group shared tour; private tours available; minibus from Lyon
wine_tours.price_range: EUR 89 per person half-day; EUR 110+ full day
wine_tours.tip: The half-day Crus tour fits neatly into a Lyon city break; departs morning and returns for dinner in Lyon.

wine_tours.name: Viti Wine Tours Beaujolais Crus Experience
wine_tours.address: Lyon, France (tours depart into Beaujolais Crus)
wine_tours.description: Private sommelier-guided tours of the Beaujolais Crus in a luxury van from Lyon. Experienced sommelier-guide drives and explains the terroir across Fleurie, Brouilly, Morgon, Moulin-a-Vent, and Chiroubles, with personalised domaine selections based on tasting preferences.
wine_tours.tour_type: Private; sommelier-guided; luxury van transport from Lyon

wine_tours.name: Active Tours Beaujolais Cycling Wine Tour
wine_tours.address: Active Tours operating in Beaujolais, France (book via active-tours.fr)
wine_tours.description: Self-guided and guided cycling tours through the rolling hills of the Beaujolais Crus, crossing vine landscapes from Fleurie to Chiroubles and Morgon. Tours include wine tastings at producer domaines and lunch in a village bistro.
wine_tours.tour_type: Self-guided and guided; cycling on road bikes
wine_tours.price_range: From EUR 89 per person per day (self-guided)

verified.address_quoted: Active Tours operating in Beaujolais, France

wine_tours.name: Velo Via Dorees Electric Bike Tours
wine_tours.address: 5A Impasse des Bouleaux, 69620 Val d'Oingt, France
wine_tours.description: Electric bike rental and guided tours through the golden-stone villages and vine-covered hills of southern Beaujolais. Packages include wine tastings at local domaines, a traditional machon meal, and GPS-guided itineraries for independent exploration.
wine_tours.tour_type: Self-guided e-bike and VTT; guided group rides available
wine_tours.price_range: EUR 42-47 per person per circuit; group and corporate rates available
wine_tours.tip: The Pierres Dorees circuit (EUR 47) is the most scenic option, winding through the golden-stone villages of Oingt, Le Perreon, Theize, and Val d'Oingt.

verified.address_quoted: 5 A Impasse des Bouleaux, Saint-Laurent d'Oingt, 69620 VAL D'OINGT

wine_tours.name: Route des Vins du Beaujolais Self-Drive Circuit
wine_tours.address: Starting point: Inter Beaujolais, Villefranche-sur-Saone, France
wine_tours.description: The 140-kilometre official Route des Vins du Beaujolais loops through all 10 Crus from Saint-Amour in the north to Brouilly in the south. The Inter Beaujolais organisation provides signage and a recommended stopping list of open domaines and caveaux along the full circuit.
wine_tours.tour_type: Self-drive; signposted circuit; open to all vehicles
wine_tours.price_range: Free route; domaine tastings and meals extra

verified.address_quoted: Starting point: Inter Beaujolais, Villefranche-sur-Saone, France

wine_tours.name: Vinotrip Romantic Escape in Beaujolais
wine_tours.description: A 2-day/1-night wine-focused romantic stay package visiting Chateau de Pizay and a selection of Cru domaines, including spa access and estate wine tasting. From EUR 460 per person; available as a gift box valid 18 months.
wine_tours.tour_type: Private; overnight stay; guided wine visits

wine_tours.name: Guided Tour and Tasting at Chateau de la Chaize
wine_tours.address: 500 Route de la Chaize, 69460 Odenas, France
wine_tours.description: A guided heritage tour of France's largest single-piece Beaujolais estate, covering 400 hectares and a classified 1676 chateau by Jules Hardouin-Mansart. Visits include the 108-metre historic cellar, Le Notre gardens, and a 3-wine tasting from the organic estate. EUR 30-75 per person.
wine_tours.tour_type: Guided estate tour; private and group formats
wine_tours.tip: The 108-metre cellar is classified as a historical monument and is one of the most impressive wine cellars in France; the Saturday-Sunday visit with charcuterie board is the most complete format.
